languages.text: Бионическая рука, искусно сотворенная неизвестным аугмент-кузнецом. Отдаленное сходство с известными моделями и явное использование ксеноматериалов вопиют о ереси сотворения.

traits.locale_text: Бионическая рука, искусно сотворенная неизвестным аугмент-кузнецом. Отдаленное сходство с известными моделями и явное использование ксеноматериалов вопиют о ереси сотворения.

languages.text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.
languages.original_text: Бионическая рука, искусно сотворенная неизвестным аугмент-кузнецом. Отдаленное сходство с известными моделями и явное использование ксеноматериалов вопиют о ереси сотворения.

traits.locale_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly indicate that this is the product of malatek heresy.

A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

languages.text: 未知の高度な増幅工匠によって作られた義手。既知のデザインに似た部分も、異素材の利用も明らかなため、マレテックの異端の産物であることは間違いない。
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly indicate that this is the product of malatek heresy.

traits.locale_text: 未知の高度な増幅工匠によって作られた義手。既知のデザインに似た部分も、異素材の利用も明らかなため、マレテックの異端の産物であることは間違いない。

languages.text: Bilinmeyen ve son derece yetenekli bir ogment ustasınca işlenmiş bir biyonik kol. Yerleşik tasarımlara olan zayıf benzerliği ve yaratımında bariz zeno materyalleri kullanımı, çalışmanın kâfirce olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

traits.locale_text: Bilinmeyen ve son derece yetenekli bir ogment ustasınca işlenmiş bir biyonik kol. Yerleşik tasarımlara olan zayıf benzerliği ve yaratımında bariz zeno materyalleri kullanımı, çalışmanın kâfirce olduğunu ortaya koyuyor.

languages.text: Un brazo biónico fabricado por un forjador de aumentos desconocido pero de gran habilidad. Su escasa similitud con los diseños convencionales y el uso flagrante de xenomateriales en su manufactura dejan claro que es obra de la herejía.
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

traits.locale_text: Un brazo biónico fabricado por un forjador de aumentos desconocido pero de gran habilidad. Su escasa similitud con los diseños convencionales y el uso flagrante de xenomateriales en su manufactura dejan claro que es obra de la herejía.

languages.text: 一条由技艺登峰造极的无名植入物匠师打造的仿生手臂。它与既有设计的微少相似性，以及制造中对异形材料的公然使用，都证明了这是异端产物。
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

traits.locale_text: 一条由技艺登峰造极的无名植入物匠师打造的仿生手臂。它与既有设计的微少相似性，以及制造中对异形材料的公然使用，都证明了这是异端产物。

languages.text: Un bras bionique fabriqué par un spécialiste des augmentations anonyme, mais fort talentueux. Sa dissemblance avec les modèles établis et l'usage flagrant de xénomatériaux lors de sa création indiquent clairement qu'il s'agit d'un objet de fabrication hérétique.
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.

traits.locale_text: Un bras bionique fabriqué par un spécialiste des augmentations anonyme, mais fort talentueux. Sa dissemblance avec les modèles établis et l'usage flagrant de xénomatériaux lors de sa création indiquent clairement qu'il s'agit d'un objet de fabrication hérétique.

languages.text: Ein von einem unbekannten Augmentierungsschmied angefertigter bionischer Arm. Die geringe Ähnlichkeit mit etablierten Entwürfen und die ungenierte Verwendung von Xenomaterialien deutet auf einen ketzerischen Ursprung hin.
languages.original_text: A bionic arm crafted by an unknown augment smith of the utmost skill. The scant resemblance to established designs and the blatant use of xenomaterials in its creation firmly establish this work as heretical.
